sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ رَامِي الْمُشِيَ فِي الصَّبَاحِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Rami je volio jutarnje šetanje svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: Rami loved walking in the morning every day.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَمُرُّ بِالْحَدِيقَةِ وَيُسَلِّمُ عَلَى الْجِيرَانِ.
sentences.translation: Prolazio je pored parka i pozdravljao komšije.
sentences.translationEn: He would pass through the park and greet the neighbors.

sentences.arabic: أَحَسَّ بِنَشَاطٍ كَبِيرٍ بَعْدَ كُلِّ مَشْيَةٍ صَبَاحِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Osjećao je veliku energiju nakon svake jutarnje šetnje.
sentences.translationEn: He felt great energy after every morning walk.

sentences.translation: Savjetovao je prijatelja da proba i prijatelj se složio.
sentences.translationEn: He advised his friend to try it and the friend agreed.
